part.text: I'll refactor the vault package to add `context.Context` parameters systematically. Let me start by examining the current state of the codebase.

todos.content: View vault client methods and understand current signatures
Add context.Context parameter to client methods (renewToken, renewLease, swapToken, get, capabilities, ping, revokeToken, revokeLease, lookupToken, post)
Add context.Context parameter to newClient function
Add context.Context parameter to toProto, toStorageStaticStore, toStorageVaultStore functions
Add context.Context parameter to NewService, validateUpdateRequest, validateCreateRequest functions
Add context.Context parameter to extractClientCertAndPk, decodePemBlocks functions
Update all call sites for changed functions
Run tests and verify project typechecks
